primary_research_question: On the same ten frozen design Candidates, how much support heterogeneity and error localization is exposed by Atomic-level measurement compared with one Candidate-level label?
not_primary_research_questions: which protocol is intrinsically more accurate
which model has greater boundary or support capability
whether the result generalizes beyond the frozen ten design cases
whether runtime integration is safe or authorized

known_asymmetries: historical single Judge output versus later dual-review adjudicated Atomic reference
model version and execution window are not contemporaneously controlled
Candidate-level label semantics refer to the Candidate as a whole

atomic_level.measurement: one frozen support_label per Atomic Claim plus deterministic Candidate aggregation

anti_circularity_guard.statement: Because the Atomic reference was constructed through an Atomic Claim pipeline, it may measure accounting, localization, aggregation, traceability, and diagnostic information loss, but it must not be used circularly to establish intrinsic Atomic accuracy superiority.
allowed_uses: Claim type and role descriptive analysis
forbidden_claims: Atomic-level measurement is proven more accurate
the result generalizes beyond the ten frozen design cases
the Project Support Gold is Human Gold
runtime or memory-write readiness has been established

entry_gates: Boundary Gold hash and frozen status match
Support Gold hash and frozen status match
Support Gold contains exactly 118 unique Boundary Claim IDs
Candidate baseline contains exactly 10 unique completed decisions
all ten case_id and candidate_response_sha256 pairs align exactly
protocol, aggregation policy, metric specification, adapter, fixtures, worklist, and manifest are frozen
current state authorizes paired protocol freeze
held-out data has not been accessed
stop_conditions: case identity or Candidate response hash drift
Boundary Gold and Support Gold claim-order mismatch
any protocol, metric, aggregation, Candidate, evidence, Boundary, or label mutation after manifest freeze
